name: io.github.nirholas/pumpfun-solana-mcp
title: pump.fun Solana Data
description: Free, read-only pump.fun + Solana MCP: token discovery, on-chain analysis, SNS, 3D snapshots.

environmentVariables.name: PUMPFUN_MCP_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the canonical pump.fun MCP backend endpoint. Defaults to https://three.ws/api/pump-fun-mcp — set this only when self-hosting the handler.
